title: sia-autoresearch source registry
description: Contract for config/sources/sources.json — the lab's living trusted-source list. Owner-editable at any time; agents search tier-1/2 entries before the open web (spec section 9 step 4) and append genuinely strong new sources every run. Weights update only by the explicit rule in spec section 10A. Agents self-validate by reading this file — no tooling required.

objective.description: One line on what this registry optimizes for

id.description: Stable source id: src-NNN — cited in notes.md and claims evidence

qualityTier.description: 1 = primary/authoritative, 2 = strong secondary, 3 = background; tier-1/2 get searched first

topics.description: Topics this source is good for — used to match registry entries to run topics

weight.description: Usefulness score, starts at 1.0; updated only by the spec section 10A rule (keep +0.05, discard -0.05, acted_on +0.10, ignored-keep -0.05; retire below 0.70, cap 1.50)

addedBy.description: Owner entries are never deleted or down-tiered by agents; agent entries must carry provenance in notes

timesUseful.description: How many kept runs cited this source

notes.description: Why this source earned a slot; for agent-added entries: which run found it
